meta.sources: ICMR-NIN IFCT 2017 (ifct2017.github.io) + USDA FoodData Central. Raw/standard items are high-confidence. Composite/cooked dishes are home-style estimates flagged trust:'seed' — calibrate to your kitchen.

trust_legend.seed: Pre-loaded generic. Reasonable but not tuned to your kitchen/portion. Calibrate items you eat often.
trust_legend.verified: You calibrated it, or a scanned label. Trust fully.
trust_legend.ai: AI-estimated at log time (Phase 2). Flagged until you verify.

meta.notes_for_claude_code: Meals reference items by 'itemName'. On import, map each itemName to the created item's id (components -> [{itemId, amount}]). All items store per100 macros in kcal/protein/carbs/fat; compute logged macros as per100 * amount/100. basis 'g' or 'ml'.
meta.revision: v1.1 — corrected Curd/Dahi and Soya Chunks (cooked) internal-consistency after external IFCT/USDA cross-review. All other items validated and held.

items.name: Roti / Chapati (plain, no oil)
items.notes: Whole wheat, no ghee. IFCT-anchored. If you brush ghee, add it separately.

items.name: Paratha (plain, pan, moderate oil)
items.notes: Home-style with ~1 tsp oil per paratha. Oil varies — calibrate.

items.name: Aloo Paratha (stuffed)
items.notes: Potato-stuffed, home-style oil. Calibrate to your kitchen.

items.name: White Rice (cooked)
items.notes: Plain boiled white rice. IFCT/USDA standard — reliable.

items.name: Jeera Rice
items.notes: Rice tempered with ghee/oil + cumin. Calibrate ghee.

items.name: Veg Biryani
items.notes: Restaurant veg biryani, notable oil/ghee. Calibrate.

items.name: Idli
items.notes: ICMR-NIN IFCT 2017: 6.3g protein/100g. Steamed, no oil — reliable.

items.name: Plain Dosa
items.notes: Thin dosa, light oil on tawa. Oil varies.

items.name: Masala Dosa
items.notes: With potato masala, more oil. Calibrate.

items.name: Medu Vada
items.notes: Deep-fried urad dal. High oil absorption — varies.

items.name: Toor/Arhar Dal (cooked, plain)
items.notes: Plain cooked pigeon-pea dal with light tempering. ~8-10g protein/katori.

items.name: Dal Tadka
items.notes: Restaurant dal with ghee tadka. Calibrate ghee.

items.name: Dal Makhani
items.notes: Butter + cream heavy. HIGHLY variable — calibrate to source.

items.name: Sprouts (moong, boiled/steamed)
items.notes: Steamed moong sprouts — reliable, high protein.

items.name: Paneer (raw)
items.notes: Full-fat paneer. IFCT/USDA-anchored — reliable. High protein + fat.

items.name: Paneer Butter Masala
items.notes: Butter + cream + cashew gravy. HIGH variability — calibrate.

items.name: Paneer Tikka (dry, grilled)
items.notes: Marinated grilled paneer. Less oil than gravies.

items.name: Malai Kofta
items.notes: Fried kofta + cream gravy. High cal.

items.name: Pani Puri / Gol Gappa (assembled)
items.notes: Puri + potato + water. Per-plate estimate; varies by filling.

items.name: Dahi Puri (assembled)
items.notes: Puri + curd + chutney + sev. Curd/sev vary.

items.name: Sev Puri
items.notes: Puri + chutneys + sev, oil in sev.

items.name: Pav Bhaji
items.notes: Bhaji (butter-heavy) + pav. Per-plate; butter varies a lot.

items.name: Vada Pav
items.notes: Fried vada in pav. Per-piece estimate.

items.name: Poha Chivda / Namkeen
items.notes: Fried namkeen mix — high cal density.

items.name: Roasted Chana (bhuna)
items.notes: Roasted bengal gram — high protein snack. Reliable.

items.name: Curd / Dahi (full fat)
items.notes: Full-fat homemade curd (from whole milk). Corrected to be internally consistent (was 98/70 mismatch). If your curd is richer/strained, calibrate from label. IFCT/USDA-aligned.

items.name: Cooking Oil (generic)
items.notes: Any vegetable oil. 9 kcal/g — for the oil-capture feature.

items.name: Whey Protein Isolate (generic scoop)
items.notes: Generic WPI. REPLACE with your Whole Truth WPI label numbers -> mark verified.

items.name: Muesli (fruit & nut)
items.notes: Generic muesli. Check your brand's label.

items.name: Margherita Pizza (veg)
items.notes: Cheese-tomato pizza. Per-slice estimate; toppings vary.

items.name: Maggi / Instant Noodles (prepared)
items.notes: Prepared masala noodles. 1 cake dry ~70g -> ~150g cooked.

items.name: Tofu (firm)
items.notes: Soy tofu. NOTE: soy — flagged for your thyroid protocol. High protein.

items.name: Soya Chunks (cooked)
items.notes: SOY — flagged for thyroid. COOKED/hydrated chunks (dry granules are ~345 kcal/100g). Corrected kcal to match macros. Very high protein. Calibrate to your brand if reintroduced.

meals.name: Roti + Dal + Sabzi (typical thali plate)
meals.notes: 2 rotis + dal + sabzi. Everyday North-Indian plate.

meals.name: Pav Bhaji (full plate)
meals.notes: Already per-plate; kept as meal for convenience.

meals.name: Whey shake in milk
meals.notes: Post-workout. REPLACE whey with your Whole Truth WPI numbers.

meals.name: Greek Yogurt + Whey bowl (your dinner)
meals.notes: Matches your evening yogurt bowl pattern.
